case_title: MINT HALL A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP vs. DURBIN, PERCY et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINT HALL A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-28-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-02-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DURBIN, PERCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 957 MISSION ST, #430, S.F, CA. $1,074.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,074.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-22-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 12-22-93, 5PM. DEF. TO PAY $350 TOWARDS JUDGMENT BY 12-22-93. SEC. DEP. FORFEITED TO PL. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
